SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FormID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.OrgDocID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocType, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocState, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FunctionType, TBL_APRDOCINFO.Href, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocTitle, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocNo, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HasAttachYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HasOpinionYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.StartDate, TBL_APRDOCINFO.EndDate, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterName, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterJobTitle, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName, TBL_APRDOCINFO.isPublic, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterName2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterJobTitle2, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WriterDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FormName, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FormName2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.UrgentApproval FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND $v_SPSUBQUERY$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY ReceivedDate $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# )C ) A

ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# )D

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.SN, CONCAT(A.OWNERID, '@', A.SN) AS DOCID , A.FORMID, A.ORGDOCID, A.DOCTYPE, A.DOCSTATE, A.FUNCTIONTYPE, A.HREF, A.DOCTITLE, A.DOCNO, A.HASATTACHYN, A.HASOPINIONYN, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERJOBTITLE, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.ISPUBLIC, A.WriterName2, A.WriterJobTitle2, A.WriterDeptName2, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2, B.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.OWNERID=B.OWNERID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.SN=B.SN WHERE A.OWNERID= #v_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND $v_SPSUBQUERY$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY ReceivedDate $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# )C ) A

ORDER BY ReceivedDate $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# )D

select.isEqual: SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName RECDEPTNAME , TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate , TBL_RECORD.RegisterYear , TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo , TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle , TBL_RECORD.DrafterName , TBL_RECORD.ExecuteDate , TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName , TBL_RECORD.DeliveryNo , TBL_RECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBL_RECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBL_RECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBL_RECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag , TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag , TBL_RECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBL_RECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, 8, 6) RECREGSN FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , IFNULL(TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName2, TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptName) RECDEPTNAME , TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate , TBL_RECORD.RegisterYear , TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo , IFNULL(TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle2, TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle) APRMEMBERTITLE , IFNULL(TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2, TBL_RECORD.DrafterName) DRAFTERNAME , TBL_RECORD.ExecuteDate , IFNULL(TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName2, TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName) RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , TBL_RECORD.DeliveryNo , TBL_RECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBL_RECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBL_RECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBL_RECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag , TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag , TBL_RECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBL_RECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , IFNULL(TBOLD.CreateOrganName2, TBOLD.CreateOrganName) CREATEORGANNAME , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, 8, 6) RECREGSN FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AUDIO_VISUALRECEXINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberIsDeptYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName , IFNULL(TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberName) APRMEMBERNAME2 , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName , IFNULL(TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName) APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberLDAPPath , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ProcessDate , TBL_APRLINEINFO.isProposerYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.isBriefUserYN , TBL_APRLINEINFO.ReasonDoNotApprov , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.orguserid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername , IFNULL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyusername) PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle , IFNULL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle) PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2 , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptid , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname , IFNULL(TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname) PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.docid AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.aprmemberSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_LASTAPRLINE WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROVAL AS REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(A.OWNERID ,'@' ,A.SN) AS DOCID, A.APRMEMBERSN, A.APRTYPE, A.APRSTATE, A.APRMEMBERID, A.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, A.APRMEMBERNAME, A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, A.APRMEMBERDEPTID, A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, A.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, A.RECEIVEDDATE, A.PROCESSDATE, A.ISPROPOSERYN, A.ISBRIEFUSERYN, A.REASONDONOTAPPROV, A.AprMemberName2, A.AprMemberJobTitle2, A.AprMemberDeptName2, B.ORGUSERID, B.PROXYUSERID, B.PROXYUSERNAME, B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, B.PROXYUSERDEPTID, B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME , A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPAPRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_TMPEXPAPRLINE B ON A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID AND A.SN = B.SN AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID ) A WHERE A.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY A.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC

isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT * FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$ LIMIT #v_LISTCOUNT#

SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE , TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' ORDER BY PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$ LIMIT #v_LISTCOUNT#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$, APRMEMBERDEPTID, HREF, DOCTITLE, FUNCTIONTYPE, DOCSTATE, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$, '0' AS RECEIVESN, DOCTYPE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$ LIMIT #v_LISTCOUNT#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN TBL_FORMUSERINFO ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_FORMUSERINFO.USERID = #v_USERID#
AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.FORMCONTID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER ON TBL_FORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMCONTAINER.TENANT_ID WHERE (1=1) AND TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND ( FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' OR FORMCONTUSERDEPID = ( SELECT DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN= #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#))
SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* FROM TBL_FORMINFO
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID#
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY FORMORDER

select.isEmpty: SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , IFNULL(FORMCONTNAME2, FORMCONTNAME) FORMCONTNAME2 , FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNull: SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , IFNULL(FORMCONTNAME2, FORMCONTNAME) FORMCONTNAME2 , FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT TBL_FormContainer.FormContID , TBL_FormContainer.FormContName , IFNULL(TBL_FormContainer.FormContName2, TBL_FormContainer.FormContName) FORMCONTNAME2 , TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID , TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents , TBL_FormContainer.FormContdescription FROM TBL_FormContainer LEFT JOIN TBL_FormContUserGroup ON TBL_FormContainer.FormContID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContID AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID= TBL_FormContUserGroup.TENANT_ID WHERE ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents = #v_ID# ) AND ( ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' ) OR ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# ) OR ( TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContUserDepID = #v_DEPTID# ) ) AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , DEPTMEMBERSN FROM TBL_LASTDEPTLINE WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY DEPTMEMBERSN DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT APRMEMBERSN APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , MEMBERDEPTNAME APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , MEMBERDEPTNAME2 APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , #v_COMPANYID# APRMEMBERLDAPPATH , NULL RECEIVEDDATE , NULL PROCESSDATE , NULL REASONDONOTAPPROV , 'N' ISPROPOSERYN , 'N' ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_LINTEMPLETDETAIL WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRLINESN = #v_APRLINESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRDEPTSN
SELECT * FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRDEPTMEMBERSN DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY MAINID
SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE MAINID = #v_MAINID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SUBID

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID , TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINNAME FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB ON TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.MAINID AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.TENANT_ID ORDER BY TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.MAINID

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY MAINID

sqlMap.select: SELECT APRDEPTMEMBERSN DEPTMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERDEPTID RECEIPTPOINTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME RECEIPTPOINTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , '1' PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , APRMEMBERID RECEIPTMEMBERID , APRMEMBERNAME RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , NULL PROCESSDATE FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRDEPTMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT DISTINCT CATEGORYCODE , CNAME , CNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY CNAME ASC

SELECT DISTINCT MCATEGORYCODE , MCNAME , MCNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND CATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY MCNAME ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE , SCNAME FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND MCATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SCNAME ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE , IFNULL(SCNAME, SCNAME2) SCNAME FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND MCATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SCNAME ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE , TASKNAME , IFNULL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME2 , KEEPINGPERIOD , DISPLAYRECFLAG , DISPLAYRECTRASTIME , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TEMPFLAG , KEEPINGMETHOD , KEEPINGPLACE FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE SUBCATEGORYCODE = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TASKNAME ASC

SELECT TBL_CABINET.CABINETID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2 FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0')
AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR = #v_PYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #v_PACCOUNTPYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK = #v_TASKCODE#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETID IN (SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID )
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, TBL_CABINET.CABINETID DESC

SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, TEMPFLAG, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, PROCESSDEPTCODE, PROCESSDEPTNAME, IFNULL(PROCESSDEPTNAME2,PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, CATEGORYCODE, CNAME, CNAME2, MCATEGORYCODE, MCNAME, MCNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE, SCNAME, SCNAME2 FROM VTASKCLASS $v_subQuery$ ORDER BY TASKCODE

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTACHFILENAME , DISPLAYNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , PAGENUM FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SN, NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT SN, NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, CONCAT(COLNAME , ' AS ' , COLALIAS) AS SELECTFIELD FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, CONCAT(COLNAME , ' AS ' , COLALIAS) AS SELECTFIELD FROM TBL_LISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_RECORD.SpecialRecordCode , TBL_RECORD.PublicityCode , TBL_RECORD.LimitRange , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferYear , TBSEPATT.DocTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.DocTransferYear , TBCAB.CabinetID , TBCAB.VolumeNo , TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptCode CABDEPTCODE , TBCABCLS.Title CABTITLE , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName CABDEPTNAME , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName2 CABDEPTNAME2 , TBCABCLS.TaskCode , TBCABCLS.TaskName , TBCABCLS.TaskName2 , TBCABCLS.ProductionYear , TBCABCLS.RegSerialNo , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_CABINET TBCAB ON TBSEPATT.CabinetID = TBCAB.CabinetID AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBCAB.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS TBCABCLS ON TBCAB.CabinetClassNo = TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo AND TBCAB.TENANT_ID = TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT N.* FROM ( SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID, TBL_RECORD.DocID, TBL_RECORD.RegisterNo, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate + $offsetMin$/(24*60) as CreateDate, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocType, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.Href, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FormID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WriterID, TBL_CABINET.ConfirmFlag, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINET.ProcessDeptCode AS CabDeptCode, TBL_CABINET.OwnerDeptID, TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate + $offsetMin$/(24*60) as RegisterDate, TBL_RECORD.AprMemberTitle$multiLang$ as AprMemberTitle, TBL_RECORD.DrafterName$multiLang$ as DrafterName, TBL_RECORD.AttachFlag, TBL_CABINET.OwnerTask, TBL_RECORD.RejectFlag, TBL_RECORD.ReceiptMemberName$multiLang$ as ReceiptName
, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityApproval
$extraSelectClause$ FROM TBL_RECORD Left Join TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID Inner Join TBL_SEPERATEATTACH On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID
Left Join TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID
Inner Join ( Select ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, VolumeNo, CabinetID, TCabinetID, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, ConfirmFlag, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, DisplayRecFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, TransDelayFlag, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, TerminateFlag, ExpirationYear, KeepingPeriod , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET On TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo
WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' And ConfirmFlag = '0') AND OwnerDeptID = #tempDeptCode#
WHERE CabinetID IN ($cabinetIDs$)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between (SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - '1') AND SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND OwnerDeptID = #tempDeptCode# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > (SELECT Max(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_CABINET A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( Select CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO A Where A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.User_ID IN (#charger#) )
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag='0'
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #cabTitle#), '%')
) TBL_CABINET On TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.TCabinetID
WHERE TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.DelFlag = '0'
CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND ( DocTransferFlag = '0' OR DocTransferFlag IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND SeperateAttachNo = '00'
DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
TBL_CABINET.TerminateFlag = '1' AND ( SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - TBL_CABINET.ExpirationYear ) > TBL_CABINET.KeepingPeriod
DocTransferFlag = '1'
( TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND TBL_CABINET.OwnerDeptID = #deptCode# AND SeperateAttachNo = '00')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1')
TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode = #recDeptCode#
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType = #regType#
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#regStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate <= STR_TO_DATE(#regEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
TBL_RECORD.RecordID IN (SELECT RecordID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC A Where A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( SC1 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC3 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') ) )
( TBL_RECORD.DrafterName Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') OR TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') )
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL OR ( SELECT 'Y' FROM DUAL WHERE 0 < ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DocID = TBL_RECORD.DocID AND A.AprMemberID = #userID# ) OR TBL_RECORD.DocID = NULL ) = 'Y' ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID= #tenantID#
) N $orderBy$
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT CODETYPE , CODE , NAME , NAME2 FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT $v_COLS$ FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT $v_COLS$ FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerID , TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title , TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title2 , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD , VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG , VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SC1 , VTASKCLASS.SC2 , VTASKCLASS.SC3 , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE , VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME , VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME2 , VTASKCLASS.SCName , VTASKCLASS.SubCategoryCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.RegSerialNo , TBL_CABINET.VolumeNo FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_MYTASKCODE ON TBL_MYTASKCODE.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN VTASKCLASS ON VTASKCLASS.TaskCode = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TaskCode AND VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_MYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBL_MYTASKCODE.CN = #v_USERID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title

SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo , VOLUMENO , TITLE , IFNULL(TITLE2, TITLE) TITLE2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , REGSERIALNO , PRODUCTIONYEAR , RECTYPECODE , TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag , TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate , TBL_CABINETCLASS.SpecialCatalogFlag , SCINFO.SC1 , SCINFO.SC2 , SCINFO.SC3 , CATEGORYCODE , MCATEGORYCODE , SUBCATEGORYCODE , CABINETTRANSFERFLAG , TCABINETID , TDEPTCODE FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE SERIALNO = '000' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) SCINFO ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = SCINFO.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = SCINFO.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN VTASKCLASS ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode = VTASKCLASS.TASKCODE AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID WHERE TRIM(TBL_CABINET.CabinetID) = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DOCID, CHANGESN, URL, CHANGEUSERID, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE2, CHANGEUSERNAME, CHANGEUSERNAME2, CHANGEUSERDEPTID, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME2, CHANGEDATE, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, CHANGEDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, CHANGEDATE DESC
ORDER BY CHANGEDATE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC'
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , PROCESSDATE , RECEIVEDDATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DOCID , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN > #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004','016','018','019' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '008','009','011','012' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocType , A.DocState , A.OrgDocID , B.AprMemberID , B.AprMemberName , B.AprMemberName2 , B.AprMemberDeptID , B.AprMemberDeptName , B.AprMemberDeptName2 , C.companyID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND B.AprMemberSN = '1' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , EXTRECEPTEMAIL FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'N' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT ORGDOCID , DOCSTATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT DEPTID , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND MAINID = #v_MAINID#

select.isEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCSTATE , HREF , APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = 1 AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , IFNULL(A.WriterDeptName2, A.WriterDeptName) WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WriterName , IFNULL(A.WriterName2, A.WriterName) WRITERNAME2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , IFNULL(C.AprMemberJobTitle2, C.AprMemberJobTitle) APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprType IN ( '001','004','016' ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC ) A LIMIT 1

SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode , C.sn FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DOCDELIVERY C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TBL_APROPINIONINFO.* FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APROPINIONINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APROPINIONINFO.UserID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberID AND TBL_APROPINIONINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APROPINIONINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APROPINIONINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC ) A LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SIGNTYPE , SIGNNAME , CONTENT FROM TBL_SIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND SIGNNAME LIKE 'sign%' ORDER BY SIGNNAME DESC ) A LIMIT 1
SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '012','011','009','008' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ExtReceptYN = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SUM(AttachFileSize) TOTALSIZE , CASE WHEN SUM(AttachFileSize) > 6000000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FLAG FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 0 TOTALSIZE , 'N' FLAG FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , USERID , USERRIGHT , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND USERRIGHT = 1 AND USERID <> 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID , SERIALNO , USERID , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , (CASE WHEN USERTITLE2 IS NULL THEN USERTITLE ELSE USERTITLE2 END) USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN DEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN DEPTNAME ELSE DEPTNAME2 END) DEPTNAME2 , READDATE FROM TBL_RECREADHISTORY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY READDATE DESC ) A LIMIT 100

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCSTATE , DOCTYPE , ORGDOCID , HREF FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# LIMIT 1
SELECT APRSN , SIGNTYPE , SIGNNAME , CONTENT FROM TBL_SIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) A LIMIT 1 AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) B LIMIT 2

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) LIMIT 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)A ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

select.isEqual:
SELECT 'DOC' TYPE , DocTitle FILENAME , Href FILEPATH FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , AttachFileName FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT 'DOC' TYPE , DocTitle FILENAME , Href FILEPATH FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , AttachFileName FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM (
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015')) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014')) OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015')
)
AND $v_SPSUBQUERY$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# ) C ) A
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# ) B
SELECT B.Href OrgHref , A.Href Href FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.OrgDocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.Href , TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocType , TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocState , TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.AprState , TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.ReceiveSN , ( SELECT TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) RECEIVEDDEPTID , ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT SN FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TBL_DOCDELIVERY.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_DOCDELIVERY.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBL_DOCDELIVERY.RECEIPTDATE DESC ) A LIMIT 1 ) SN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO
JOIN TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY PROCESSYN ) B LIMIT 1

SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, WRITERID, APRTYPE, HREF FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002', '005') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$, DOCID DESC

SELECT DISTINCT CName, MCName, SCName, CABINETID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBL_CABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE2, TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE, VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD, VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG, VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG, VTASKCLASS.SC1, VTASKCLASS.SC2, VTASKCLASS.SC3, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN VTASKCLASS ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE = VTASKCLASS.TaskCode AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0') AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR = #v_PYEAR#
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETID IN ( SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBL_CABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID )
AND TBL_CABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TITLE$v_LANGTYPE$ like '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
ORDER BY TBL_CABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, CABINETID DESC

SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID , TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME , TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState <> '003' AND A.AprState <> '010' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN ASC

select.isEqual:
SELECT DOCID DOCID , FLAG FLAG FROM ( SELECT DOCID , 'APR' FLAG FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID , 'END' FLAG FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ) A WHERE DOCID IN ( SELECT ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ORGDOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT DOCID , 'APR' FLAG FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_DOCID# AND DOCSTATE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT C.DocID , C.FLAG , ( SELECT DocID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO D WHERE D.OrgDocID = C.DOCID AND D.WriterDeptID = C.WRITERDEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) GDOCID FROM ( SELECT A.DOCID DOCID , 'END' FLAG , B.WRITERDEPTID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocID DocID , 'APR' FLAG , B.WriterDeptID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY FLAG DESC, DOCID DESC ) LIMIT 1 ) C

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, IFNULL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, IFNULL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, IFNULL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, IFNULL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, IFNULL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL,'') AS SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND DOCNO LIKE '%$v_DOCNUMBER$%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DRAFTER$%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DEPTNAME$%'
AND FORMID = $v_FORMID$
AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE2#,1,10),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND ENDDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE1#,1,10),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND ENDDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE2#,1,10),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
AND CONTAINERID IN ($v_CONTID$)
AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER# GROUP BY TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# ) A ) B
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE
ORDER BY ENDDATE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, (CASE WHEN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL END) AS SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# ) ) A
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$ LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# )
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# )
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2# )
ORDER BY ENDDATE LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2#)

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(OWNERID , '@' ,SN ) DOCID , DOCTITLE FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM ( SELECT ONCAT(OWNERID , '@' ,SN ) DOCID , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , TO_BINARY_FLOAT(NULL) ATTACHFILESIZE FROM ( SELECT ONCAT(OWNERID , '@' ,SN ) DOCID , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID
NOT
LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = UPPER(#v_MODE#)
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
)A
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE#

SELECT D.DisplayName$v_pLang$ AS DISPLAYNAME, WRITERDEPTID, COUNT(WRITERDEPTID) AS DRAFTCOUNT, IFNULL(TOTALCOUNT2, 0) AS SUSINCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.DisplayName$v_pLang$, ContainerOwnDepID, COUNT(ContainerOwnDepID) AS TOTALCOUNT2 , A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_Container B ON A.ContainerID = B.ContainerID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_Deptmaster C ON B.ContainerOwnDepID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE ContainerTypeID = '500' AND (A.StartDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.StartDate <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) GROUP BY B.ContainerOwnDepID, C.DisplayName$v_pLang$, A.TENANT_ID) B ON A.WriterDeptID = B.ContainerOwnDepID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_Deptmaster D ON A.WriterDeptID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND (A.StartDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.StartDate <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY D.DisplayName$v_pLang$, WRITERDEPTID, TOTALCOUNT2 ORDER BY DRAFTCOUNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState = #v_PAPRSTATE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN DESC

SELECT WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WriterName2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WriterJobTitle2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WriterDeptName2 , ORGDOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RECEIVESN , SENTDEPTID , SENTDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN SENTDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN SENTDEPTNAME ELSE SENTDEPTNAME2 END) AS SENTDEPTNAME2, RECEIVEDDEPTID , RECEIVEDDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ELSE RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 END) AS RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY RECEIVESN DESC ) LIMIT 1
SELECT ORGDOCNUMCODE , HREF FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , '회송문서' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , 'Return a document' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# LIMIT 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , C.AprMemberJobTitle2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprState IN ( '004' ) ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocID , A.FormID , A.OrgDocID , A.DocType , A.DocState , A.FunctionType , A.Href , A.DocTitle , #v_PDOCNO# DocNo , A.HasAttachYN , A.HasOpinionYN , A.StartDate , A.EndDate , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterJobTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , ' ' Html , ' ' pUserID , ' ' pUserName , WriterDeptID pDeptID , ' ' OrgHtml , SecurityCode security , StoragePeriod keepperiod , isPublic publication , WriterID proxyuserid , ItemCode , ItemName , UrgentApproval , KeyWord , ' ' Xdocid , B.SpecialRecordCode SPECIALRECORDCODE , B.PublicityCode PUBLICITYCODE , B.LimitRange LIMITRANGE , B.PageNum PAGENUM , B.CabinetID CABINETID , B.TaskCode TASKCODE , B.DocNumCode DOCNUMCODE , B.OrgDocNumCode ORGDOCNUMCODE , B.SeperateAttachXML SEPERATEATTACHXML , B.Summary SUMMARY , B.SecurityApproval SECURITYAPPROVAL , A.WriterName2 WRITERNAME2 , A.WriterJobTitle2 WRITERJOBTITLE2 , A.WriterDeptName2 WRITERDEPTNAME2 , ' ' PUSERNAME2 , b.ItemName2 ITEMNAME2 FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CODE2, NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE CODE1 = 'A01' AND ISUSE = 1 ORDER BY CODE2

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND TRIM(CODE2) = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2
SELECT NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 =#v_CODE1# AND CODE2 =#v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND CODE2 = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

select.isNotEqual: SELECT CODE2 FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ = #v_NAME#

SELECT CASE WHEN IFNULL(COUNT(DocID), 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID, 1, 7) AprMemberDeptID FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN = '1' ) AND ( APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# ) AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SECURITYCODE FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_RECROLEINFO ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECROLEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE ( TBL_RECROLEINFO.SeperateAttachNo = '00' ) AND ( TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserID = #v_USERID# ) AND ( TBL_RECROLEINFO.UserRight = '1' ) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS COUNT FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) AS COUNT FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS COUNT FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015'))
OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014')) OR (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
)
AND PROCESSDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND PROCESSDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND PROCESSDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND PROCESSDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'Y' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE = '015' AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(SN) AS COUNT FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT ContainerID FROM ( SELECT TBL_Container.ContainerID ContainerID FROM TBL_Container JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_Container.ContainerTypeID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND TBL_Container.TENANT_ID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_Container.ContainerOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND TBL_Container.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT ContainerTypeID FROM ( SELECT TBL_ContainerType.ContainerTypeID ContainerTypeID FROM TBL_ContainerType JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_ContainerType.ContainerTypeID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND TBL_ContainerType.TENANT_ID = TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT CONCAT(#v_CONTAINERID# , ':' , #v_CONTAINERTYPEID#) CONTAINERID FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Container ( CONTAINERID, CONTAINERTYPEID, CONTAINEROWNDEPID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_MAXCONTAINERID#, #v_CONTAINERTYPE#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SUBSTR(CONCAT('0000000000' , ((CASE WHEN MAX(CONTAINERID) IS NULL THEN '0000000000' ELSE MAX(CONTAINERID) END) + 1 )), -10, 10) FROM TBL_Container WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PROCESSDATE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT RECEIPTMEMBERID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) LIMIT 1

select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERNAME2 APRMEMBERNAME FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004' )

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 APRMEMBERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC
