select.isNotEqual: SELECT ' ' HREF FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT APRTYPE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_APRMEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CONTENT FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC
SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND DOCSTATE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DOCID > 0 THEN ( SELECT AprState FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) ELSE ( SELECT AprState FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) DOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) )
SELECT MAX(VOLUMENO) + 1 NEWVOLNO FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TRIM(CABINETCLASSNO) = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SENTDEPTID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN#

SELECT CASE WHEN FORMCONNFLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE FORMCONNFLAG END FORMCONNFLAG FROM TBL_FormInfo A JOIN ( SELECT FORMID ,TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) B ON ( A.FormID = B.FORMID ) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE = '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(SN) FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT COUNT(TBL_FormContainer.FORMCONTID) FROM TBL_FormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_PID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(TBL_FormContainer.FormContID) FROM TBL_FormContainer LEFT JOIN TBL_FormContUserGroup ON TBL_FormContainer.FormContID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContID AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = TBL_FormContUserGroup.TENANT_ID WHERE ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContParents = #v_PID# ) AND ( ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' ) OR ( TBL_FormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) OR ( TBL_FormContUserGroup.FormContUserDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) ) AND TBL_FormContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(APRLINESN) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_LINTEMPLET WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN APRDEPTSN = 0 THEN 0 WHEN APRDEPTSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE APRDEPTSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(APRDEPTSN) APRDEPTSN FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# )
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(MODIFYSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(MODIFYSN) end AS MODIFYSN FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_RECORD.RecordID) FROM TBL_RECORD Left Join TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID Inner Join TBL_SEPERATEATTACH On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID
Left Join TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO On TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID
Inner Join ( Select ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, VolumeNo, CabinetID, TCabinetID, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, ConfirmFlag, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, DisplayRecFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, TransDelayFlag, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, TerminateFlag, ExpirationYear, KeepingPeriod , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET On TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo
WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' And ConfirmFlag = '0') AND OwnerDeptID = #tempDeptCode#
WHERE CabinetID IN ($cabinetIDs$)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4)
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between (SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - '1') AND SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND OwnerDeptID = #tempDeptCode# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > (SELECT Max(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( Select CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO Where TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND User_ID IN (#charger#) )
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag='0'
TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #cabTitle#), '%')
) TBL_CABINET On TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.CabinetID
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = TBL_CABINET.TCabinetID
WHERE TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_RECORD.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.DelFlag = '0'
CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND ( DocTransferFlag = '0' OR DocTransferFlag IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND SeperateAttachNo = '00'
DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
TBL_CABINET.TerminateFlag = '1' AND ( SUBSTR(#nowDate#, 0, 4) - TBL_CABINET.ExpirationYear ) > TBL_CABINET.KeepingPeriod
DocTransferFlag = '1'
( TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND TBL_CABINET.OwnerDeptID = #deptCode# AND SeperateAttachNo = '00')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '011' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '2')
( TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DocState = '014' OR TBL_RECORD.DocType = '1')
TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode = #recDeptCode#
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RegisterType = #regType#
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#regStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
TBL_RECORD.RegisterDate <= STR_TO_DATE(#regEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
TBL_RECORD.RecordID IN (SELECT RecordID FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC Where TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( SC1 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') OR SC3 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #sc#), '%') ) )
( TBL_RECORD.DrafterName Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') OR TBL_RECORD.DrafterName2 Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #drafter#), '%') )
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL OR ( SELECT 'Y' FROM DUAL WHERE 0 < ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DocID = TBL_RECORD.DocID AND AprMemberID = #userID# ) OR TBL_RECORD.DocID = NULL ) = 'Y' ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
( TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode >= #userSecurityCode# OR TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SecurityCode IS NULL ) AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID= #tenantID#
SELECT CASE WHEN USER_ID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) USER_ID FROM TBL_CABROLEINFO WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_CabClassNo# AND USER_ID = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_UserMaster WHERE Department = #v_DEPTID# AND extensionAttribute1 LIKE '%a=1%' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE = #v_APRTYPE# AND APRSTATE IN ( '002','005' )
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(APRSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(APRSN) END APRSN FROM TBL_SIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT MIN(RegSerialNo) FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) B WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) D WHERE Code = '4') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) B WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) D WHERE Code = '4'), 1, 0, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT RollbackFlag FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) B WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) D WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) B WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# )D WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# + 1 WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#)B WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#)C WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# )D WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID#
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (MAX(SN) + 1) END FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN MODIFYSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MODIFYSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(MODIFYSN) MODIFYSN FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT CASE WHEN SN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN SN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(SN) SN FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND ( DATE_FORMAT(RECEIPTDATE,'%Y') = #v_YEAR# ) )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND DOCNO LIKE '%$v_DOCNUMBER$%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DRAFTER$%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DEPTNAME$%'
AND FORMID = #v_FORMID#
AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE2# ,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND ENDDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE1#,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND ENDDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE2# ,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND PROCESSDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_PROCESSDATE1#,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND PROCESSDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_PROCESSDATE2#,1,10), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
AND CONTAINERID IN ($v_CONTID$)
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DocID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004' AND APRSTATE = '002'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '002'

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ( #v_DEPTINFO# ) AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE <> '015' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN = 'N' AND DATE_FORMAT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= #v_UNTILYEAR# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(CABINETID) CABCOUNT FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND OWNERDEPTID = #v_DEPTCODE# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #v_UTCYEAR# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID
NOT
LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = UPPER(#v_MODE#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_PUSERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_PUSERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRTYPE <> '007'
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_PUSERIDS$) AND functiontype ='004'
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_PUSERIDS$) #v_PSUBQUERY#
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

sqlMap.select: SELECT count(USERRIGHT) FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND USERID = 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT UserRight FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND RecordID = #v_RecID# AND SeperateAttachNo = #v_SepAttNo# AND UserID = 'All_User'

SELECT COUNT(RecordID) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN ( SELECT DEPARTMENT DEPTID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DEPTID DEPTID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_AddJobMaster WHERE CN = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) DEPTINFO ON DEPTINFO.DEPTID = TBL_RECORD.ProcessDeptCode AND DEPTINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID WHERE RECORDID = #v_RecID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT UserRight FROM TBL_RECROLEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND RecordID = #v_RecID# AND SeperateAttachNo = #v_SepAttNo# AND UserID = #v_UserID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# ) D WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# ) C WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# ) B WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 1, 4), SUBSTR(#v_SYSDATE#, 6, 2)) FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE Code = '4'), #v_CurSN#, 1 , #v_TENANTID#)

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE = '015'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015'

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'Y' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOTIFICATION ( ItemSeq, USERID, POSTDATE, SENDER, SUBJECT, TYPE, ETCDATA , TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_itemSeq#, #v_PUSERID#, #v_SYSDATE#, #v_PSENDER#,#v_PSUBJECT#, #v_PTYPE#, #v_PETCDATA#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT max(ItemSeq) FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CABINET ( CABINETID, VOLUMENO, CABINETCLASSNO, CREATEDATE, CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, DELFLAG , TENANT_ID )VALUES ( #v_CABINETID#, #v_VOLUMENO#, #v_CABCLASSNO#, #v_SYSDATE#, '0', '0' , #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , DEPTMEMBERSN , ReceiptPointName2 , ReceiptMemberJobTitle2 , ReceiptMemberName2 , RouteYN , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , USERID , OPINIONGB , CONTENT , USERNAME , USERJOBTITLE , USERDEPTID , USERDEPTNAME , OPINIONSN , UserName2 , UserJobTitle2 , UserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , ATTACHSN , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL , SUBATTACHYN , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , AttachUserName2 , AttachUserJobTitle2 , AttachUserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , ATTACHFILESN , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , PAGENUM , DISPLAYNAME , BODYATTACH , AttachUserName2 , AttachUserJobTitle2 , AttachUserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , ORGUSERID , PROXYUSERID , PROXYUSERNAME , PROXYUSERJOBTITLE , PROXYUSERDEPTID , PROXYUSERDEPTNAME , proxyusername2 , proxyuserjobtitle2 , proxyuserdeptname2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH , RECEIVEDDATE , PROCESSDATE , REASONDONOTAPPROV , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN , AprMemberName2 , AprMemberJobTitle2 , AprMemberDeptName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ( DocID, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, KEYWORD, FORMNAME, COMPANYID, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, URGENTAPPROVAL, SECURITYAPPROVAL, TEMPATTRIBUTE, STATUS, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, CABINETID, TASKCODE, DOCNUMCODE, ORGDOCNUMCODE, SEPERATEATTACHXML, SUMMARY, FormName2, ItemName2, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , SECURITYCODE , STORAGEPERIOD , KEYWORD , FORMNAME , COMPANYID , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , URGENTAPPROVAL , SECURITYAPPROVAL , TEMPATTRIBUTE , STATUS , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , PAGENUM , CABINETID , TASKCODE , DOCNUMCODE , ORGDOCNUMCODE , SEPERATEATTACHXML , SUMMARY , FormName2 , ItemName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCINFO ( SELECT #v_PDOCID# , FORMID , ORGDOCID , DOCTYPE , DOCSTATE , FUNCTIONTYPE , HREF , DOCTITLE , DOCNO , HASATTACHYN , HASOPINIONYN , NULL , ENDDATE , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERJOBTITLE , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , ISPUBLIC , WriterName2 , WriterJobTitle2 , WriterDeptName2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_CabIDList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0'
SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISUsed END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '2')

SELECT MAX(RegSerialNo) FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 001 END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) E WHERE Code = '1') F ) AND Type2 = ( #v_DDeptCode# ) AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN '0' ELSE #v_numRows# END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') D) AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '4') B ) AND RollbackFlag = '0'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 001 END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) E WHERE Code = '1') F ), #v_DDeptCode#, (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISUsed END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') D ), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE Code = '4') B ), $v_RtnSN$, 0 , #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = #v_RtnSN# + #v_numRows# WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 001 END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) F WHERE Code = '1') E) AND Type2 = #v_DDeptCode# AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE $v_numRows$ END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) C WHERE Code = '3') D) AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN CONCAT(#v_YEAR#, #v_MONTH#) END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM TBL_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) A WHERE Code = '4') B ) AND RegSerialNo = $v_RtnSN$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CABINETCLASS ( CabinetClassNo, ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, Title, Title2, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, RecTypeCode, OwnerName, OwnerName2, OwnerID, ExpirationYear, TerminateFlag, KeepingPeriod, KeepingMethod, KeepingPlace, DisplayRecFlag, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, SpecialCatalogFlag, OldCabinetFlag, ModifyFlag, NumOfRec, PageOfRec, NumOfElectronicDoc, ConfirmFlag, CreateDate, ConfirmYear, TransDelayFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, DelFlag, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CONCAT(#v_DDeptCode#, #v_DTaskCode#, #v_YEAR#, #v_CNT#) , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DDeptName# , #v_DDeptName2# , #v_DTaskCode# , #v_DTaskName# , #v_DTaskName2# , Title , Title2 , #v_YEAR# , #v_CNT# , RecTypeCode , #v_DeptMName# , #v_DeptMName2# , #v_DeptMID# , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , '0' , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , ConfirmFlag , #v_SYSDATE#, ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DTaskCode# , '0' , TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND INSERT INTO TBL_CABINET ( CabinetID, CabinetClassNo, VolumeNo, CreateDate, CabinetTransferFlag, DelFlag, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CONCAT(#v_CABINETCLASSNO#, '001') , #v_CABINETCLASSNO# , '001' , #v_SYSDATE#, '0' , '0' , #v_TENANTID# FROM DUAL )

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo CabinetClassNo, NEWTASK.KeepingPeriod, NEWTASK.KeepingMethod, NEWTASK.KeepingPlace, NEWTASK.DisplayRecFlag, NEWTASK.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS ,( SELECT KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , TBL_TASKCODE.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TBL_TASKCODE.TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TBL_TASKCODE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) NEWTASK WHERE TRIM(TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo) IN ( SELECT CONCAT(#v_DDeptCode#, #v_DTaskCode#, #v_YEAR#, #v_CNT#) NewCabClsNo FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB ( SerialNo, CabinetClassNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT '000' , CONCAT(#v_DDeptCode#, #v_DTaskCode#, #v_YEAR#, #v_CNT#) , ( SELECT SC1 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) , ( SELECT SC2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) , ( SELECT SC3 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#), #v_TENANTID# FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' )

TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo ON TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.CabinetClassNo = TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) AND TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

UPDATE TBL_CABINET SET CabinetTransferFlag = '2', TDeptCode = #v_DDeptCode#, TransferDate = #v_SYSDATE#, TDeptName = #v_DDeptName#, TDeptName2 = #v_DDeptName2# WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT CabinetClassNo FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) A WHERE ConfirmFlag = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

, KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , IFNULL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) tt_tmpClassInfo JOIN TBL_CABINETHISTORY ON tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINETHISTORY.CabinetClassNo AND tt_tmpClassInfo.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINETHISTORY.TENANT_ID WHERE tt_tmpClassInfo.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND tt_tmpClassInfo.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT FORMID FROM TBL_FORMUSERINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_FORMUSERINFO (FORMID, USERID ,TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_FORMID# ,#v_USERID# ,#v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCINFO ( DOCID, FORMID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , #v_FORMID# , FORMDOCTYPE , '001' , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_FormInfo WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ( DOCID, FORMNAME, FORMNAME2, COMPANYID, STATUS, SECURITYCODE, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, CABINETID, TASKCODE, DOCNUMCODE, ORGDOCNUMCODE, SEPERATEATTACHXML, SUMMARY, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , FORMNAME , FORMNAME2 , #v_COMPANYID# , 'N' , 999 , NULL , NULL , NULL , 0 , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET PROCESSDATE = #v_SYSDATE#, APRSTATE = '003', PROCESSYN = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '002'
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO ( DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, PAGENUM, DISPLAYNAME, BODYATTACH, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , ATTACHFILESN , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERNAME2 , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2 , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2 , PAGENUM , DISPLAYNAME , BODYATTACH , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO ( DOCID, ATTACHSN, ATTACHDOCNAME, ATTACHDOCURL, SUBATTACHYN, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , ATTACHSN , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL , SUBATTACHYN , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERNAME2 , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2 , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, PROCESSDATE, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH , RECEIVEDDATE , REASONDONOTAPPROVAL , PROCESSDATE , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_EXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, ORGUSERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERNAME2, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, PROXYUSERDEPTID, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 , TENANT_ID) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , APRMEMBERSN , ORGUSERID , PROXYUSERID , PROXYUSERNAME , PROXYUSERNAME2 , PROXYUSERJOBTITLE , PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2 , PROXYUSERDEPTID , PROXYUSERDEPTNAME , PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET PROCESSDATE = #v_SYSDATE#, APRSTATE = '002', PROCESSYN = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003'

UPDATE TBL_CABINETCLASS SET CONFIRMFLAG = '1', CONFIRMYEAR = #v_SYSDATE#, EXPIRATIONYEAR = #v_SYSDATE# -1 WHERE CABINETCLASSNO IN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE ROWID IN ( SELECT TBL_CABINETCLASS.ROWID row_id FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND OWNERDEPTID = 'GJS' AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECREADHISTORY ( DocID, SerialNo, UserID, UserName, UserName2, UserTitle, UserTitle2, DeptCode, DeptName, DeptName2, ReadDate ) VALUES ( #v_DocID#, (SELECT CASE WHEN SERIALNO = 0 THEN 1 WHEN SERIALNO IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE serialNo + 1 END FROM( SELECT MAX(serialNo) serialNo FROM TBL_RECREADHISTORY WHERE DocID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)), #v_UserID#, #v_UserName#, #v_UserName2#, #v_UserTitle#, #v_UserTitle2#, #v_DeptCode#, #v_DeptName#, #v_DeptName2#, #v_SYSDATE#)

update.isNotEqual: DELETE FROM TBL_MYTASKCODE WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET DOCTITLE = #v_DOCTITLE# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG , TENANT_ID) ( SELECT #v_DOCID#, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, #v_SYSDATE#, ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(MODIFYSN),0) + 1 FROM TBL_HISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#), #v_USERID#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, #v_USERJOBTITLE#, #v_USERJOBTITLE2#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_DEPTNAME#, #v_DEPTNAME2#, ' ' , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO ( RECEIVESN, DOCID, SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME, SENTDEPTNAME2, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, DOCSTATE, APRSTATE, PROCESSDATE, PROCESSYN, PROCESSDOCID, PROCESSORID, PROCESSORNAME, PROCESSORNAME2, PROCESSORJOBTITLE, PROCESSORJOBTITLE2, PARENTSDOCID ) ( SELECT #v_RECEIVESN# , #v_DOCID# , SENTDEPTID , SENTDEPTNAME , SENTDEPTNAME2 , #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID# , #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME# , #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2# , DOCSTATE , '012' , #v_SYSDATE#, '1' , PROCESSDOCID , #v_PROCESSORID# , #v_PROCESSORNAME# , #v_PROCESSORNAME2# , #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE# , #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE2# , PARENTSDOCID FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND PROCESSYN = 'N' )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET PROCESSDATE = #v_SYSDATE# , PROCESSYN = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND PROCESSYN = 'N'
UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET PROCESSYN = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND PROCESSYN = '1'

DELETE FROM TBL_EXPAPRLINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DOCDELIVERY SET CHARGEID = #v_CHARGEID#, CHARGENAME = #v_CHARGENAME#, CHARGENAME2 = #v_CHARGENAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CODE2 FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = 'A04' AND NAME = #v_DOCSTATE#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET APRSTATE = '012', PROCESSORID = #v_PROCESSORID#, PROCESSORNAME = #v_PROCESSORNAME#, PROCESSORNAME2 = #v_PROCESSORNAME2#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE2 = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE2#, RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND SENTDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#

UPDATE TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO SET APRSTATE = '012', PROCESSORID = #v_PROCESSORID#, PROCESSORNAME = #v_PROCESSORNAME#, PROCESSORNAME2 = #v_PROCESSORNAME2#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE#, PROCESSORJOBTITLE2 = #v_PROCESSORJOBTITLE2#, RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME#, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '010', PROCESSDATE = #v_SYSDATE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '002'
UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '002', PROCESSDATE = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '010'
UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET ENDDATE = STARTDATE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '002', RECEIVEDDATE = #v_SYSDATE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001'
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '002', RECEIVEDDATE = #v_SYSDATE# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001' AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORMUSERINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_LINTEMPLETDETAIL WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRLINESN = #v_APRLINESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_LINTEMPLET WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRLINESN = #v_APRLINESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLETDETAIL WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_DEPTTEMPLET WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND APRDEPTSN = #v_APRDEPTSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASOPINIONYN = 'N' WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASATTACHYN = #FLAG# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
