sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASATTACHYN = #FLAG# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC LIMIT 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET FUNCTIONTYPE = '006' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '002', PROCESSDATE = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN#
UPDATE TBL_APRLINEINFO SET APRSTATE = '001', RECEIVEDDATE = NULL, PROCESSDATE = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN >= #v_APRMEMBERSN#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM TBL_CONTAINER A JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM TBL_CONTAINER A JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid, A.containerowndepid FROM TBL_CONTAINER A JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid <> #deptID# ORDER BY A.containerowndepid, B.containertypeid
SELECT cn, displayname, displayname2, extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND cn IN (#v_CNVALUE#) AND IFNULL(extensionattribute5, '' ) != ''

SELECT A.cn AS userid, A.displayname AS username, A.displayname2 AS username2, A.extensionattribute5, B.displayname AS pusername, B.displayname2 AS pusername2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON SUBSTR(A.extensionattribute5,0,INSTR(A.extensionattribute5,':') - 1) = B.cn AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.extensionattribute5 is not null
SELECT isuse FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE code1 = #v_CODE1# AND code2 = #v_CODE2# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT receivesn FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND docid = #v_DOCID# AND receiveddeptid = #v_RECEIVEDDEPTID#
SELECT flag FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT pwd FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT pwdtype FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT receivesn FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT $v_COL$ FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.docid = B.docid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.docid = #v_DOCID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.docid = B.docid AND A.aprmembersn = B.aprmembersn AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.docid = #v_PDOCID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND (aprtype = '002' OR aprtype = '007' OR aprtype = '008' OR aprtype = '009' OR aprtype = '080' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND aprtype IN ( '018','019','007','031','002')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND aprtype = '004'

select.isEqual: SELECT Name FROM TBl_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = #v_CodeType# AND Code = #v_Code# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT Name2 FROM TBl_CABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = #v_CodeType# AND Code = #v_Code# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT StartDate FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT EndDate FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT VERSION , RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , REGISTERDATE , TITLE , NUMOFPAGE , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTER , DRAFTER2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , STR_TO_DATE(MODIFYDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') MODIFYDATE , MODIFYREASON , MODIFIERNAME , MODIFIERNAME2 , MODIFIERID , MODIFYFLAG FROM TBL_RECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY VERSION ASC

SELECT TBL_RECORD.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , REGISTERTYPE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , ELECTRONICRECFLAG , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , MANUALREGFLAG , REGISTERDATE , EXECUTEDATE , SEPERATEATTACHNO , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN VERSION IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE VERSION + 1 END FROM ( SELECT MAX(VERSION) VERSION FROM TBL_RECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , DATE_FORMAT(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,'%Y%m%d') , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , '0' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , #v_DATE# , #v_CHANGEREASON# , #v_USERID# , #v_USERNAME# , #v_USERNAME2# , '0' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1', TITLE = #v_TITLE# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1' WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RECORD SET REGISTERDATE = #v_REGDATE#, APRMEMBERTITLE = #v_APRMEMTITLE#, APRMEMBERTITLE2 = #v_APRMEMTITLE2#, DRAFTERNAME = #v_DRAFTER#, DRAFTERNAME2 = #v_DRAFTER2#, EXECUTEDATE = #v_EXEDATE#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME = #v_RECEIPTMEM#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 = #v_RECEIPTMEM2#, ELECTRONICRECFLAG = #v_ELECFLAG# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# $v_SUBQUERY$
AND MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
AND ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND CHARGENAME LIKE '%$v_CHARGENAME$%'
AND RECEIPTDATE > STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#,1,19),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND RECEIPTDATE < STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#,1,19),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT SN, DOCID, HREF, RECEIPTDATE, ORGANID, ORGAN, ORGAN2, DOCNUMBER, MANAGEDEPTID, MANAGEDEPT, MANAGEDEPT2, CHARGEID, CHARGENAME, CHARGENAME2, DEPTID, REMARK, ORGDOCNUMCODE, DOCTITLE FROM TBL_DOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# $v_SUBQUERY$
AND SN BETWEEN #v_PAGESIZE2# AND #v_PAGESIZE#
AND MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
AND ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND CHARGENAME LIKE '%$v_CHARGENAME$%'
AND RECEIPTDATE > STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#,1,19) ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND RECEIPTDATE < STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#,1,19) ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, RECEIPTDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, RECEIPTDATE DESC
ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE DESC, SN DESC
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE# )
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, RECEIPTDATE
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, RECEIPTDATE
ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE DESC, SN
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2#

SELECT N.* FROM ( SELECT TBL_CABINET.CabinetID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RegSerialNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear, TBL_CABINET.VolumeNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ModifyFlag, TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskName2, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName, TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2, TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo, TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode as RecTypeCode, TBL_CABINETCLASS.CreateDate + $offsetMin$/(24*60) AS ClassCreateDate, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.SpecialCatalogFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID, TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerTask, TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag $extraSelectClause$ FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ( ( OwnerDeptID = #deptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '0' ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode = #deptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '1') )
AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ConfirmFlag = '0')
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID = #deptCode#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title$multiLang$ Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode IN ( #taskCode# )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear >= #sProduceYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear <= #eProduceYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear >= #sExpYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear <= #eExpYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode = #recTypeCode#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod = #keepPeriod#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingMethod = #keepMethod#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = #keepPlace#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT A.CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.User_ID IN ( #charger# ) )
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between #nowYear# - '1' And #nowYear# ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = #nowYear# ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0' AND CatalogTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(CatalogTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
AND DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > #nowYear# ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND (#nowYear# - TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear) > TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod
AND DocTransferFlag = '1'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear = #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelayEndYFlag = 'Y' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
) N $orderBy$
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
) N $orderBy$ LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo WHERE TBL_CABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ( ( OwnerDeptID = #deptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '0' ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode = #deptCode# AND ConfirmFlag = '1') )
AND NOT (TBL_CABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND ConfirmFlag = '0')
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.OwnerDeptID = #deptCode#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.Title$multiLang$ Like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode IN ( #taskCode# )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear >= #sProduceYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ProductionYear <= #eProduceYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear >= #sExpYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear <= #eExpYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode = #recTypeCode#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod = #keepPeriod#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingMethod = #keepMethod#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = #keepPlace#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo IN ( SELECT A.CabinetClassNo From TBL_CABROLEINFO A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.User_ID IN ( #charger# ) )
AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND RTRIM(DISPLAYENDDATE) <> '' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < #transExpire# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear < #transExpire# - 1 ) ) ) AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '2' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear Between #nowYear# - '1' And #nowYear# ) OR ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate < CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear = #nowYear# ) ) ) AND CatalogTransferFlag = '0'
AND CatalogTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferFlag = '0' AND CatalogTransferYear = ( SELECT MAX(CatalogTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
AND DocTransferFlag = '1' AND DocTransferYear = #nowYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPlace = '1' AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate >= CAST(#nowYear# AS char(4)) ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.TransDelayFlag = '1' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExTransYear > #nowYear# ) ) AND ( ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear = #nowYear# ) OR ( TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmYear > ( SELECT MAX(DocTransferYear) From TBL_CABINET A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) )
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND (#nowYear# - TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear) > TBL_CABINETCLASS.KeepingPeriod
AND DocTransferFlag = '1'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear = #accountYear#
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.DelayEndYFlag = 'Y' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #accountYear# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0'
AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UserName FROM TBL_CABROLEINFO WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_CABINETCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE DocID IS NOT NULL AND CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABCLS.TaskCode , TBCABCLS.TaskName , TBCABCLS.TaskName2 , TBCABCLS.Title , TBCABCLS.ProductionYear , TBCABCLS.RegSerialNo , TBCABCLS.RecTypeCode , TBCABCLS.ExpirationYear , TBCABCLS.TerminateFlag , TBCABCLS.KeepingPeriod , TBCABCLS.KeepingMethod , TBCABCLS.KeepingPlace , TBCABCLS.DisplayRecFlag , TBCABCLS.DisplayEndDate , TBCABCLS.DisplayReason , TBCABCLS.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBCABCLS.OldCabinetFlag , TBCABCLS.ModifyFlag , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) NUMOFREC , (SELECT ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN A IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A END FROM ( SELECT SUM(NumOfPage) A FROM TBL_SEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) + ( SELECT CASE WHEN B IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE B END FROM ( SELECT SUM(TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.PageNum) B FROM TBL_RECORD JOIN TBL_SEPERATEATTACH ON TBL_RECORD.RecordID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_RECORD.DocID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.DocID AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) )) FROM DUAL) NUMOFPAGE , #v_cabID# NUMOFFILE , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag , TBCABCLS.ConfirmYear , CATALOGTRANSFERFLAG , CATALOGTRANSFERYEAR , DOCTRANSFERFLAG , DOCTRANSFERYEAR , TBCAB.CabinetID , TBCAB.VolumeNo , TBCAB.CreateDate , TBCAB.CabinetTransferFlag , TBCAB.TCabinetID , TBCAB.TDeptCode , TBCAB.TTaskCode , TBCAB.TProduceYear , TBCAB.TRegSerialNo , TBCAB.TVolumeNo , TBCAB.TCabinetName , TBCAB.TCabinetName2 , TBCAB.TDeptName , TBCAB.TDeptName2 , TBCAB.TTaskName , TBCAB.TTaskName2 , TBCAB.TransferDate , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , TBOLD.ClassificationNo , #v_userName# CABCHARGER FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS TBCABCLS JOIN TBL_CABINET TBCAB ON TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo = TBCAB.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID = TBCAB.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_OLDCABINETEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo = TBOLD.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCAB.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBCAB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = ( SELECT DISTINCT CABINETCLASSNO FROM TBL_CABINET WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SERIALNO

SELECT CABINETID , TBL_CABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TITLE , RECTYPECODE , KEEPINGPERIOD , DISPLAYRECFLAG , DISPLAYENDDATE , DISPLAYREASON , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBL_CABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINET.CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT VERSION , CABINETCLASSNO , TITLE , RECTYPECODE , STR_TO_DATE(MODIFYDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') MODIFYDATE , MODIFYREASON , MODIFIERNAME , MODIFIERNAME2 , MODIFIERID , MODIFYFLAG FROM TBL_CABINETHISTORY WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY VERSION ASC
SELECT USER_ID , USERNAME , USERNAME2 FROM TBL_CABROLEINFO WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(RECEIPTPOINTID) CNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(RECEIPTPOINTID) CNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSYN IN ( 'N','E','T' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO ( DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND PROCESSYN IN ( 'N','E','T' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB (CabinetClassNo, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_CABINETCLASSNO#, '000', #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_TENANTID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB (CabinetClassNo, SerialNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID) Values (#v_CABINETCLASSNO#, #v_SERIALNO#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCTYPE , DOCSTATE , FUNCTIONTYPE , DOCTITLE , DOCNO , HASATTACHYN , HASOPINIONYN , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WRITERJOBTITLE2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , ISPUBLIC FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SECURITYCODE , STORAGEPERIOD , KEYWORD , FORMNAME , FORMNAME2 , COMPANYID , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , ITEMNAME2 , URGENTAPPROVAL , TEMPATTRIBUTE , STATUS , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , PAGENUM , CABINETID , TASKCODE , DOCNUMCODE , ORGDOCNUMCODE , SEPERATEATTACHXML , SUMMARY , SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM TBL_APRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) A
SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID FROM TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT DEPTMEMBERSN , RECEIPTPOINTID FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY PROCESSDATE
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO SET DEPTMEMBERSN = #v_DEPTMEMBERSN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , EXTRECEPTEMAIL FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'N' AND PROCESSYN = 'W'

SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM TBL_SPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC WHERE RECORDID = ( SELECT DISTINCT RECORDID FROM TBL_RECORD WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SERIALNO

SELECT CASE WHEN FLAGCOUNT > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM( SELECT CASE WHEN FLAG='N' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) ELSE 1 END AS FLAGCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DocState='017' THEN 'Y' WHEN FunctionType = ' ' OR FunctionType IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM ( SELECT DocState , FunctionType FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DocID =#v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) C) B) A

DELETE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN VERSION IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE VERSION + 1 END FROM( SELECT MAX(VERSION) VERSION FROM TBL_RECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID= #v_RECORDID# AND SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, DATE_FORMAT(TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,'%Y%m%d'), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '1' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID From TBL_SEPERATEATTACH Inner Join TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID Where TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_RECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, #v_SYSDATE#, #v_CHANGEREASON#, #v_USERID#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, '1' , TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID From TBL_SEPERATEATTACH Inner Join TBL_RECORD ON TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBL_RECORD.RecordID AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBL_RECORD.TENANT_ID Where TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBL_SEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEPERATEATTACH SET ModifyFlag = '1' WHERE RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_RECORD SET SpecialRecordCode = #v_SPECIALREC#, PublicityCode = #v_PUBCODE#, LimitRange = #v_LIMITRANGE# WHERE RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

UPDATE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET SpecialRecordCode = #v_SPECIALREC#, PublicityCode = #v_PUBCODE#, LimitRange = #v_LIMITRANGE# WHERE DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_RECORD A WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DOCDELIVERY ( sn, DocID, Href, ReceiptDate, OrganID, Organ, Organ2, DocNumber, ManageDeptID, ManageDept, ManageDept2, ChargeID, ChargeName, ChargeName2, DeptID, Remark, OrgDocNumCode, DocTitle, TENANT_ID) (SELECT #v_maxSN#, a.DocID, a.Href, #v_SYSDATE#, #v_OrganID#, #v_Organ#, #v_Organ2#, a.DocNo, #v_ManageDeptID#, #v_ManageDept#, #v_ManageDept2#, #v_ChargeID#, #v_ChargeName#, #v_ChargeName2#, #v_DeptID#, #v_Remark#, b.DocNumCode, a.DocTitle , a.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO a INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO b ON a.DocID = b.DocID AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE a.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND a.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

UPDATE TBL_CABINETCLASS SET DelayEndYFlag = 'N', ExpirationYear = ExpirationYear + 1 Where CabinetClassNo IN ($v_CabinetClassNo$) AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID#
